title: Grass Clovers
description: Gives short grass a chance of appearing as clovers.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Grass Clovers** gives short grass the chance of appearing as clovers through blockstates and a custom model. The weight for the clovers is set to 1, and 5 for short grass.
